iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 48% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). Natanz + Bushehr + Dimona/Arad struck (prior). IAEA: no radiation. Nuclear tit-for-tat in pause as conventional war dominates. Trump ultimatum to hit power plants raises nuclear escalation risk. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. IMMINENT (up). UAE air defences actively responding to NEW Iranian missile threat (06:59 local). Indian national injured by debris in Abu Dhabi. Trump to Channel 13: ultimatum result "very good" - possible face-saving signal. Araghchi softens: Hormuz "not closed" (insurers self-restricting). Iraq pro-Iran group extends embassy attack pause. Countdown: ~20hrs to ultimatum deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Brent $114+. Asian markets plunging. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE air defences responding to ACTIVE Iranian missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE air defense systems actively responding to incoming Iranian missile threat. Citizens told to shelter. Fresh attack as ultimatum deadline approaches.

latest_news.headline: Indian national injured by missile debris in Abu Dhabi
latest_news.source: Gulf News / Abu Dhabi Media Office
latest_news.text: Indian national sustained minor injuries from falling debris in Al Shawamekh area after air defences intercepted ballistic missile. Debris landed in residential area.

latest_news.headline: Trump says ultimatum result will be 'very good' - tells Israel's Channel 13
latest_news.text: Trump tells Israel's Channel 13 that Iran will 'soon find out' about the 48-hour deadline, says result will be 'very good' - suggesting possible diplomatic off-ramp rather than immediate strikes.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: 'Strait of Hormuz is not closed'
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi says Hormuz is NOT formally closed - ships hesitate due to insurer fears. 'Freedom of Navigation cannot exist without Freedom of Trade. Respect both - or expect neither.' Softer framing than IRGC 'complete closure' threats.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 60% (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. IMMINENT (up). IDF Chief: operation "only just begun" and will be "prolonged." Katz orders intensified bridge/home demolitions in south Lebanon - Qasmiyeh Bridge destroyed. Aoun: "prelude to ground invasion." 7 IDF soldiers wounded by mortar. 1,029+ killed in Lebanon. Cluster bomb fragments in central Israel. No ceasefire prospects. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel orders military to intensify demolitions of bridges + homes in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz orders IDF to step up destruction of bridges and demolish homes in frontline villages in southern Lebanon. Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Katz: operations will continue until threats to Israeli communities eliminated.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO air defences active. 22 nations signed Hormuz initiative (NATO SecGen Rutte). No Turkey-specific escalation. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 10% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). Putin called Iran "loyal friend." Oil price shock boosting Russian revenue. No direct intervention signals. US 30-day Russian oil sanctions waiver active. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. US-China trade talks ongoing. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 33% (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults, spring-summer offensive prep. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Deadliest day 2026 recorded (1,610 KIA). Oil shock boosts Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. ELEVATED (up). Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but massively violated. TTP-linked militants kill 3 police in KP. Guardian: families search for loved ones after Kabul hospital strike (400+ killed). ICG warns "deadly violence likely without dialogue." Post-Eid resumption of full fighting near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

top_signals: TRUMP 48HR ULTIMATUM: ~20hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon) — Trump to Channel 13: result will be 'very good'
UAE ACTIVE DEFENCE: Air defences intercepting NEW Iranian missile threat this morning — Indian national injured in Abu Dhabi by debris
IRGC DEFIANT: Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants struck — but Araghchi softens: 'not closed, insurers self-restricting'
ARAD STRUCK: 88 hospitalized from Iranian missiles near Dimona
CLUSTER MUNITIONS: Iranian cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv/Petah Tikva — 15 injured
IDF CHIEF: Lebanon operation 'only just begun' — will be 'prolonged'
LEBANON: Katz orders intensified bridge/home demolitions — Aoun: 'prelude to ground invasion'
OIL: Brent at $114+ — Asian markets plunging (Japan, HK, Korea tumble)
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but TTP kills 3 police in KP — post-Eid violence near-certain
22 NATIONS: NATO SecGen confirms 22 countries signed Hormuz safe passage initiative
IRAQ: Pro-Iran group extends pause on US embassy attacks — slight de-escalation signal
2,000+ DEAD across region — war enters FOURTH week

new: Pakistan ceasefire breached: mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika during Eid, 1 civilian killed
Bessent: US may occupy Kharg Island — 'could become American asset'
2,500 additional marines + 3 amphibious assault ships deploying
IRGC explicitly threatens Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants struck
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire technically through Mar 24 but breached (mortar fire Kunar/Paktika). IAEA confirms no radiation at Dimona/Natanz. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~28hrs. IRGC threatens 'complete' Hormuz closure + retaliation on ALL regional infrastructure. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' + Kharg Island occupation possible. 2,500 more marines deploying. 2,000+ dead. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Pakistan ceasefire fraying — post-Eid violence feared.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defences responding to ACTIVE Iranian missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE air defense systems actively responding to incoming Iranian missile threat. Citizens told to shelter. Fresh attack as ultimatum deadline approaches.

latest_news.headline: Trump says ultimatum result will be 'very good'
latest_news.text: Trump tells Israel's Channel 13 that Iran will 'soon find out' about the 48-hour deadline, says result will be 'very good' — possible diplomatic off-ramp.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: 'Strait of Hormuz is not closed'
latest_news.text: Iran FM softens stance: Hormuz not formally closed, ships hesitate due to insurer fears. 'Respect both — or expect neither.'

latest_news.headline: 22 nations sign Hormuz safe passage initiative
latest_news.text: NATO SecGen Rutte confirms 22 nations signed up to Hormuz safe passage initiative led by UK's Starmer. Multiple NATO allies involved.

latest_news.headline: TTP-linked militants kill 3 police in KP during Eid ceasefire
latest_news.text: TTP-linked militants attack police company in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, killing 3 officers. Eid ceasefire in tatters as violence continues.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 24, 03:04 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~20hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). UAE intercepting ACTIVE Iranian missile threat this morning. Trump hints "very good" outcome — possible face-saving. Araghchi softens Hormuz language. 22 nations mobilizing for Hormuz passage. IDF intensifies Lebanon operations. Pakistan ceasefire dead. 2,000+ dead. Countdown to ultimatum deadline tonight — watch for Trump action or diplomatic off-ramp.
de_escalation_watch: Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Araghchi softens Hormuz language (not formally closed). Iraq pro-Iran group extends embassy attack pause. Trump hints result will be "very good" — possible diplomatic off-ramp. ESCALATION: UAE ACTIVE missile interception this morning. Fresh Iranian strike on Abu Dhabi. Ultimatum ~20hrs away. IDF intensifies Lebanon demolitions. 22 nations mobilizing for Hormuz. Post-Eid Pakistan violence certain. NET: Net escalation toward ultimatum deadline. Slight diplomatic signals but military action continues unabated.
